title: Grand Archive Before Visit
summary: A powder-dry archive where ledgers go missing in plain sight.
notes:
A powder-dry archive where ledgers go missing in plain sight.

Read-aloud cues: Dust and Brass - When the archive scene opens. - Dust coats the brass railings like ash, and every missing ledger leaves a cleaner stripe behind.
